tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.validation_notes: Runs successfully, found 64 lines of lint issues (errcheck, staticcheck, etc.)

tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.validation_notes: Runs successfully, found 3 issues (1 staticcheck, 2 unused)

tools.name: go mod verify
tools.run_command: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto go mod verify

tools.name: go mod tidy
tools.run_command: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto go mod tidy
tools.fix_command: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto go mod tidy
tools.validation_notes: Used in CI to check for uncommitted changes after running tidy

tools.name: flake8
tools.validation_notes: Found multiple style violations in concatenate_license.py files

linting.notes: CI also runs govulncheck for vulnerability scanning and checks generated code hasn't changed

testing.run_single_file: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.32 -p path)" go test -v {file}
testing.run_single_test: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.32 -p path)" go test -v ./controllers/... -ginkgo.focus="{test_name}"
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for Kubernetes API mocking
testing.coverage_command: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto make test (generates cover.out or cover-rbac-{true,false}.out)
testing.notes: Tests use kubebuilder's envtest which creates a lightweight Kubernetes API. notebook-controller runs a single test suite. odh-notebook-controller runs two: test-with-rbac-false and test-with-rbac-true (104 specs total). Integration tests exist but require KinD cluster. E2E tests in odh-notebook-controller require full cluster access.

gating_checks.name: go mod tidy -diff
gating_checks.command: cd components/{component} && go mod tidy && git diff --exit-code

advisory_checks.name: integration tests
advisory_checks.command: Requires KinD cluster - see integration test workflows

ci.notes: GitHub Actions runs on pull_request to main and v1.10-branch. Tekton runs on OpenShift for multi-arch container builds. Integration tests build containers and deploy to KinD clusters.

build.install_command: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto go mod download
build.notes: Uses kubebuilder controller-gen for CRD and RBAC manifest generation. Requires GOTOOLCHAIN=auto for Go 1.25.7. Container builds use podman by default. Pre-build steps: make manifests generate fmt vet.

conventions.test_naming: Go: Test* functions and ginkgo Describe/It blocks. Ginkgo uses BDD-style naming.
conventions.import_style: Standard Go import style with controller-runtime patterns
conventions.notes: Two main components: notebook-controller (upstream Kubeflow) and odh-notebook-controller (OpenDataHub variant). Both follow kubebuilder project structure.

setup_commands: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq make git curl python3 python3-pip

lint_commands.notes: Found 64 lines of issues (errcheck, staticcheck, etc.) - working correctly
Found style violations in Python utility scripts - working correctly

test_commands.notes: All tests pass (102+104 specs in two runs), coverage 69.8-71.1%

container_recipe.test_single_file: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.32 -p path)" go test -v {file}
container_recipe.test_single_test: cd components/{component} && GOTOOLCHAIN=auto KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.32 -p path)" go test -v ./controllers/... -ginkgo.focus="{test_name}"
container_recipe.notes: Go 1.25.7 is required but not available in standard golang:1.22 image. Using GOTOOLCHAIN=auto automatically downloads the correct version. Tests use envtest which downloads Kubernetes API binaries on first run. Some 'no such tool covdata' warnings appear but don't affect test execution.

validation.summary: All validation successful: deps install OK, build OK, lint OK (found legitimate issues), tests OK (all pass with good coverage)

gaps: Integration tests require KinD cluster - not runnable in basic container
E2E tests require full Kubernetes/OpenShift cluster with deployed controllers
semgrep.yaml config exists but not executed in GitHub Actions CI (may be used locally or in Tekton)
No pre-commit hooks configured - code generation and linting must be run manually
Python code is minimal (only utility scripts) with lint violations that appear to be accepted
